title: Ctx struct has no doc comment
description: evaluator.rs Ctx struct (line 26) is pub(crate) and threaded through all eval_* functions, but has no doc comment. headers is a Vec (not HashMap) for ordering reasons; regex_cache is pre-populated at compile time; variables_enabled gates RFC 5229 behavior. These invariants are invisible to a new reader. Add a struct-level doc comment and field comments on the non-obvious fields.
